title: Glade Air Freshener, Aerosol Room Spray, Vanilla Blossom, Pack of 12 (12 x 300ml)
features: Embark on a journey of modern comfort with the alluring notes of sweet florals creamy vanilla and white woods
Bring to mind vanilla blossoms, white orchid and muguet
Instantly infuse the air with passionately crafted fragrance to express your spirit
Air freshener for home designed to fight tough odours
Use on a daily basis or as a final touch after your cleaning routine; your home will have a fruity, floral and woody scent
description: Product Description Embark on a journey of modern comfort with Glade Romantic Vanilla Blossom Embrace room freshener spray. Alluring notes of sweet florals are delicately wrapped around creamy vanilla and white woods. Touches of vanilla blossoms, white orchid and muguet add a delightful subtlety. Designed to fight tough odours and leave behind a sweet vanilla fragrance, Glade air fresheners can be used on a daily basis or as the final touch after your cleaning routine. This fragrance spray instantly infuses the air with passionately crafted fragrances. Directions Shake can well. To freshen the air, point can towards the centre of the room and spray. This product is not recommended for use on fabrics. Directions Shake can well. To freshen the air, point can towards the centre of the room and spray. This product is not recommended for use on fabrics.
